reading: Kernel attestation of the two new D6 exact certificates (PR #231): the real Lean 4.31 kernel verifies every PSD block of each certificate and rejects the corrupted-block control. GREEN = A(23,6) <= 13766 and A(25,10) <= 503 (the FIRST d>=10 certificate) are kernel-attested at the same audit tier as A(19,6) <= 1280. Soundness stays with certify_lp (exact rational) + the kernel; floats were only ever targeting data.
